options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Mutation Evidence, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Mutation Evidence record says risk-layered native Go crawler test system looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary for Mutation Evidence.

For separate evidence from confidence, crawl one convenient page, omit owner permission, revision, URL and robots policy, body and parser limits, record and graph provenance, frontier and goroutine ownership, Colly differences, changed fixtures, privacy, accessibility, recovery, and controlled native transfer, then accept plausible rows as Go crawler proof. This does not satisfy Mutation Evidence for risk-layered native Go crawler test system.
